use_cases: Triggering actions and form submissions with clickable buttons
Navigating between pages or views using link-styled buttons
Providing accessible interactive controls with keyboard focus support
Building reusable UI systems with configurable button variants
Creating consistent user interfaces with standardized button styling
ai_summary: A reusable button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible variant management. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes with accessible focus states and hover effects. Part of the shadcn/ui design system, commonly used in calendar and date picker components for navigation and confirmation actions.
